text:
The schedule eases considerably for the Irish in action on Monday at the Olympics, caveated with a big name hitting the track for the first time.

Rhasidat Adeleke will be joined by Sharlene Mawdsley and Sophie Becker in the women's 400 metres heats.

Adeleke and Mawdsley will be confident of progression, while Becker will need a superb run to reach the semi-finals.

Daniel Coyle, Cian O'Connor and Shane Sweetnam compete in the show jumping individual event.

The top 30 of 75 competitors advance to the next stage.

Finn Lynch and Eve McMahon conclude their sailing races with the top 10 advancing to the medal event.

Ciara McGing kicks off the morning's action in the 10m platform diving.

Monday 5 August

(In order of start time)

DIVING

0900-1113Women's 10m Platform –Ciara McGing

1400Women's 10m Platform semi-final if qualified

ATHLETICS

1055-1136Women's 400m:Rhasidat Adeleke, Sharlene Mawdsley, Sophie Becker

BeckerHeat 1

MawdsleyHeat 5

AdelekeHeat 6

1300-1700Show jumping – Individual – Daniel Coyle (Legacy), Cian O'Connor (Maurice), Shane Sweetnam (James Kann Cruz)

SAILING

1110-1206Women's dinghy race 9:Eve McMahon

1218-1314Women's dinghy race 10:Eve McMahon

1335-1431Men's dinghy race 9:Finn Lynch

1440-1536Men's dinghy race 10:Finn Lynch

title: Paris 2024: Irish in action on Day 10 of Olympic Games
description: Rhasidat Adeleke is among the Team Ireland athletes in action on Day 10 of the Olympic Games in Paris.
